titles.text: Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Special Episode 0 - In A Dark Past

descriptions.text: This ROM hack expands the lore of Pokémon Mystery Dungeon: Explorers of Sky by diving into the emotional and ideological origins of Grovyle and Dusknoir. Originally close allies, the two Pokémon are slowly driven apart as their conflicting visions of fate and freedom emerge. Through a dramatic prequel narrative, players experience their transformation, culminating in a seamless connection to the official storyline. Designed as a character-driven and lore-enhancing mod, this episode offers an immersive adventure through rich dialogue, expressive art, and a faithful adaptation of the original mechanics.

Before becoming adversaries in the world of Explorers of Sky, Grovyle and Dusknoir were partners with a shared mission. "In A Dark Past" explores the pivotal choices and emotional wounds that caused their bond to fracture. Players are taken through an apocalyptic future, forced to confront questions of loyalty, destiny, and sacrifice. What begins as a story of camaraderie unfolds into a tragic tale of ideals in conflict—ultimately answering how two legendary figures ended up on opposing sides of history.
